Title: injectAll — Copy all components with valid language
Preconditions: Extension installed; workspace open; all resources exist
Steps_Summary: Call injectAll(python) then verify all 5 component dirs exist
Expected_Result: All 4 CORE_COMPONENTS + python indexer copied to workspace

Title: injectSelective — Select and inject specific components
Steps_Summary: Call injectSelective() then verify only selected dirs exist
Expected_Result: Only agents and hooks directories created

Title: copyDirRecursive — Copy directory tree preserving structure
Preconditions: Source dir with nested structure: src/a/b/file.txt
Test_Data: Source tree with 3 levels nesting 5 files
Steps_Summary: Call copyDirRecursive then verify all files at correct paths
Expected_Result: Directory structure mirrors source exactly

Title: copyFiltered — Copy only items in filter list
Preconditions: Source has python/ java/ nodejs/ bash/ powershell/
Steps_Summary: Call copyFiltered then verify only python/ exists at dest
Expected_Result: Only python directory copied; others absent

Title: checkStatus — Report all components present
Test_Data: All component dirs exist in workspace
Steps_Summary: Call checkStatus then verify all fields true
Expected_Result: Status object: all 5 booleans = true

Title: injectAll — One component source missing (AF-1)
Steps_Summary: Call injectAll then verify 3/4 components + warning logged
Expected_Result: 3 components injected; steering skipped with warning

Title: injectAll — Workspace already has components (overwrite)
Steps_Summary: Call injectAll then verify file overwritten
Expected_Result: Existing files overwritten with new content silently

Title: injectSelective — User selects only indexer
Steps_Summary: Call injectSelective then verify only indexer copied
Expected_Result: Only python indexer scripts exist; no core components

Title: injectSelective — One component fails others continue
Steps_Summary: Call injectSelective then verify 2/3 succeed
Expected_Result: agents+hooks copied; steering failed; partial success msg

Title: injectAll — No workspace open (EF-1)
Steps_Summary: Call injectAll with no workspace
Expected_Result: Error: Please open a workspace before injecting resources

Title: injectAll — Invalid indexer language (EF-3)
Steps_Summary: Call injectAll(ruby) then verify error
Expected_Result: Error listing valid options; no files copied

Title: injectSelective — User cancels QuickPick (EF-1)
Steps_Summary: Call injectSelective with cancel then verify no changes
Expected_Result: No files created; no notification; silent cancel

Title: copyDirRecursive — Source does not exist (EF-1)
Steps_Summary: Call copyDirRecursive with bad source
Expected_Result: Error thrown with path information

Title: copyDirRecursive — Destination not writable (EF-2)
Steps_Summary: Call copyDirRecursive with read-only dest
Expected_Result: Error: Cannot write to workspace. Check file permissions

Title: BR-1 — All 4 CORE_COMPONENTS copied
Steps_Summary: Call injectAll then count component dirs
Expected_Result: Exactly 4 CORE_COMPONENT dirs + 1 indexer created

Title: BR-2 — Exactly 1 indexer language
Steps_Summary: Call injectAll(java) then verify only java indexer exists
Expected_Result: Only java/ in scripts dir; python/nodejs/bash/powershell absent

Title: BR-3 — Existing files overwritten without merge
Steps_Summary: Call injectAll then read overwritten file
Expected_Result: Content is "v2"; no merge dialog shown

Title: BR-4/BR-8 — Excluded directories never copied
Preconditions: Source has all 5 excluded dirs + 1 normal dir
Steps_Summary: Call copyDirRecursive then check excluded dirs absent
Expected_Result: src/ copied; all 5 excluded dirs absent from destination

Title: BR-5 — QuickPick supports multi-select
Steps_Summary: Execute Inject Selective and select multiple items
Expected_Result: Multiple items selectable simultaneously

Title: BR-6 — Cancel = no file modifications
Steps_Summary: Cancel QuickPick then compare workspace hash
Expected_Result: Hash before === hash after (no modifications)

Title: BR-7 — Partial failure doesn't abort remaining
Steps_Summary: Inject with failure then verify #3 still copied
Expected_Result: Component #1 and #3 copied despite #2 failure

Title: BR-8 — Exclusion list contains exactly 5 items
Steps_Summary: Read and verify EXCLUDE_LIST
Expected_Result: Length=5; contains node_modules/__pycache__/.git/out/dist

Title: BR-9 — Exclusion is case-sensitive
Steps_Summary: Call copyDirRecursive then check each
Expected_Result: node_modules excluded; Node_Modules and NODE_MODULES copied

Title: BR-10 — Exclusion applies at any depth
Steps_Summary: Call copyDirRecursive then check nested path
Expected_Result: src/lib/ exists but src/lib/node_modules/ does not

Title: BR-11 — Files with excluded names still copied
Test_Data: File "dist" with content "I am a file"
Steps_Summary: Call copyDirRecursive then verify file exists
Expected_Result: File "dist" copied; content="I am a file"

Title: BR-12 — Only filter list items copied
Steps_Summary: Call copyFiltered then verify only filter items exist
Expected_Result: python/ and README.md copied; java/ nodejs/ absent

Title: BR-13 — Filter matching is exact (no glob)
Steps_Summary: Call copyFiltered then verify no partial matches
Expected_Result: Only python/ copied; python3/ and python-scripts/ absent

Title: BR-14 — Missing filter items silently skipped
Steps_Summary: Call copyFiltered then verify no error for missing item
Expected_Result: python/ copied; no error thrown for nonexistent

Title: BR-15 — Exclusion rules apply within filtered dirs
Steps_Summary: Call copyFiltered then check exclusions inside python/
Expected_Result: python/src/ copied; python/node_modules/ and python/__pycache__/ excluded

Title: BR-16 — checkStatus() is read-only
Preconditions: Workspace with known file state snapshot
Steps_Summary: Call checkStatus then compare before/after snapshots
Expected_Result: Snapshots identical — no file modifications

Title: BR-17 — All components default false if workspace invalid
Steps_Summary: Call checkStatus with invalid path
Expected_Result: All 5 status fields = false

Steps_Summary: Call copyFiltered with empty filter

Steps_Summary: Call injectAll with empty string
Expected_Result: Error listing valid options; no files copied

Steps_Summary: Call copyDirRecursive then verify deep file exists

Expected_Result: Defined behavior (copy target or skip)

Title: copyDirRecursive — Empty source directory
Preconditions: Source directory exists but is empty

Steps_Summary: Execute inject commands and verify notification text

Title: Exclusion list is complete and immutable
Steps_Summary: Verify excluded set is always exactly 5 items
